description: Founded an AI and data science innovation conference and mentorship platform empowering aspiring developers through curated conversations with engineering leaders, mentorship, and direct learning opportunities.
achievements: Curated conversations with engineering leaders from Netflix, Google, Microsoft, and more — sharing learnings and insights on engineering, AI, and data science topics.
Coached 20+ engineers on career paths, providing regular feedback, growth opportunities, and mentorship to foster professional development and a culture of continuous learning.
Created a recurring platform for emerging developers from underserved backgrounds to plug into the engineering community.
Paired the conference with the Pledge to Equality Scholarship Program, granting 10,000+ scholarships to underserved communities.
